query_normalized: socratic transformers: dialogue-based self-teaching through adversarial questioning computer science
rationale: The paper investigates how language models (including transformer‑based models) can use the Socratic method—i.e., dialogue‑based, question‑driven teaching—to guide users toward solutions, which matches the same mechanism (Socratic questioning/self‑teaching) queried by the user (criterion a). It therefore provides relevant prior work for a literature review on Socratic Transformers.
